name: mern-doctor-appointment-system
description: Doctor Appointment Booking System - Full Stack

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run frontend" "npm run admin"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd mern-doctor-appointment-booking-system-main/backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../admin-portal && npm install
scripts.build: cd mern-doctor-appointment-booking-system-main/frontend && npm run build && cd ../admin-portal && npm run build
